T01_TOWN_07_message.message1: Hey, Sophie. Blow anything up again today?
Hey, can you maybe watch the store for me someti-... No?
Where should I go to observe plants today... Heh heh, I'm excited for this!
Treat the plants you use for alchemy with care and respect. I'll get mad if you don't.
There are still plants that I haven't seen, somewhere in this world... Gah, I really want to talk to them!
Alright, time to get goin-... Oh, crap! I totally forgot that mom asked me to do some work...!
Ah, thanks. As I expected from you, Sophie.
T01_TOWN_07_message.message2: Did you finish the item I asked for?

T01_TOWN_07_message.message1: Hm, hm... I see...
I'm totally beat.
I'm still not used to this...
Let's see...
I see, I didn't know.
I got a big order. I need to finish it by next "Fruit" day.
I should be able to finish about 40% of the order today.
Today's going well. I should be able to finish about 60% of the order today.
I managed to finish about 80% of the order. Just a little more to go.
I managed to finish the job. I think I can take a break today.
One of my friends asked for my help.
Well... I'm busy, but it's good to have work to do.
I'm getting orders from all kinds of people. I want to fulfill them all quick, but...
I won't get anything done if I get hurt or sick. I'll work in moderation.
This is a nice morning... Days like this are good for painting.
This is a nice sunset... Days like this are good for painting.
This is a nice night sky... Days like this are good for painting.
Rain makes the colors run... Painting in the rain makes some very special art.
Pictures using the scenery here as a motif are very popular.
I really like the scenery here... It makes me paint even more.
I actually don't even have to sit here anymore to paint this scenery...
But I want my senses to influence what I paint, so I came here again.
Hm... If I bake it, the bad smell goes away, but the texture gets worse...
In that case, maybe I should leave a little of the smell, and steam it instead...
Gah... My head is filled with ideas for food, I can't get any work done.
Hm... That tastes good, but it doesn't look very pleasant...
Maybe it would be better to mash it up so you don't see what it looks like...
Gah... My head is filled with ideas for food, I can't get any work done.
Hm... But that was surprising. I didn't expect that combination would work...
I didn't think it would reproduce that taste. I should think of more combinations...
Gah... My head is filled with ideas for food, I can't get any work done.
The foundation of thrift starts with keeping good order. You need to manage and maintain your stuff...
That helps reduce the burden on yourself.
Is it cheaper to buy something, or go and procure it yourself...
It might be better to buy items, if you want to build friendly relations with shopkeepers.
You only need to buy what's necessary... But seeing other things on shelves makes you want them too.
Sometimes when you think it over, you already have it. You should make sure before you buy anything.
Three days until the next weekend... That's bothersome, but I have no choice.
Two days until the next weekend... I need to be careful not to fall into a slump.
Tomorrow's the weekend... I need to work hard today.
Two days until work... I'll just relax today.
Tomorrow's a work day... I should be sure to rest up.
I never feel motivated at the beginning of the week...
I feel decently motivated in the middle of the week... Or maybe not.
Knowing tomorrow is the weekend really motivates me...
Tomorrow's the weekend too... Knowing that lets me relax.
Tomorrow's a work day... I need to start changing my attitude.
The beginning of the week makes me want to make lots of plans.
Tomorrow's a work day too... Thinking that can actually be a little relieving sometimes.
Thinking that tomorrow's the weekend makes me want to make weekend plans.
Enjoying the weekend gives me a good sense of fulfillment.
Tomorrow's work again... I'll do my best.
